summary: test_agent_turn_clears_blocked_in_the_same_write uses the real TaskService/SqlAlchemyStore, sets blocked=True beforehand, then asserts blocked is False on both the returned and re-fetched task, and pins tasks_version()==before+1 to prove a single save_task call — genuinely rejects both a blocked-left-true bug and a two-write violation of 'same mutation'.
